mapper.select: SELECT ID, BARRAGE_MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, VISITOR_ID, IP, USER_AGENT, CREATE_TIME FROM barrage_message_like WHERE BARRAGE_MESSAGE_ID = #{barrageMessageId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT ID, BARRAGE_MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, VISITOR_ID, IP, USER_AGENT, CREATE_TIME FROM barrage_message_like WHERE BARRAGE_MESSAGE_ID = #{barrageMessageId} AND VISITOR_ID = #{visitorId}
